title: Ferment Funky Peruvian Matcha Tart
description: A crispy, romantic Peruvian dish featuring fermented matcha and FODMAP-friendly ingredients.
instructions: In a medium bowl, whisk together matcha powder, coconut sugar, and a pinch of salt.
Heat the coconut oil in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Add the grass-fed gelatin to the warm coconut oil and whisk until dissolved.
In a blender or food processor, combine the almond milk, apple cider vinegar, and egg yolks.
Blend the mixture until smooth and creamy.
Add the matcha mixture, Peruvian purple corn flour, and the gelatin mixture to the blender.
Blend the mixture until well combined and the Peruvian purple corn flour is fully incorporated.
Pour the mixture into a 9-inch tart pan with a removable bottom.
Bake the tart in a preheated oven at 350°F for 25-30 minutes, or until the edges are lightly golden brown.
Allow the tart to cool completely before serving.
